name: aegis-toolkit
displayName: AEGIS — Agentic Engineering Guardrails & Intelligence System
description: Sight beyond sight. Skills, agents, spec-driven artifacts, and the Ariadne codebase-graph MCP server that make Copilot (and smaller models) perform like frontier ones.

commands.title: AEGIS: Install into Workspace (skills, agents, Ariadne)
AEGIS: Install Skills & Agents Only (no Ariadne)
AEGIS: Pull Team-Shared Index from CI
AEGIS: Enrich Insights via Copilot (uses your Copilot seat)
AEGIS: Update Workspace Payload (preserves config & index)
AEGIS: Generate Flow Docs & Progress Report

aegis.runtime.description: Runtime edition of the Ariadne indexer/server to install and launch.

aegis.autoRegisterAriadne.description: Automatically provide the Ariadne MCP server to Copilot when .ariadne/ exists in the workspace.
